equity.label: S&P 500 equity pressure
equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-11-05 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 25.09
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-11-05: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 25.09/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as inflation expectations and equity stress shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-11-05, the score printed 25.09/100 in the elevated regime, with inflation expectations and equity stress doing most of the work.
